nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Greetings, my friend. I am Yang Guo, having roamed Jianghu for many years. Your bearing is extraordinary - surely you also have stories?

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Though I'm known for martial arts, I also have considerable insight into Go. I've heard you meet friends through Go - how about we exchange some moves?

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: My Go style is adaptable, valuing softness to overcome hardness and feeling to guide position. If you're interested, let's play.

options.text: Hero Yang, I'd like to play another game with you
I'd like to hear your thoughts on Go

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Good. If you want to see my true style, we must play a game first.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: I've roamed Jianghu for many years and exchanged moves with countless masters. If you can beat me, it proves you have the aptitude.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: No need to be disheartened. Go is like life - wins and losses are all practice. Keep learning, and you'll improve.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: In Go, the hardest part is keeping your heart steady. Sometimes you attack, sometimes you yield - always follow the flow.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: If you can use softness to restrain hardness, you can find life even in adverse positions.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: No matter. Come back when you're ready. I'll be here.

nodes.speaker: Yang Guo
nodes.text: Until we meet again! May you have smooth sailing in Jianghu!
